questions.question: What is the primary benefit of using serverless computing?

options.A: You manage the underlying servers directly
options.B: You pay only for the compute time you actually use
options.C: It always runs faster than traditional servers

questions.question: Which AWS service automatically scales Lambda functions?
What trigger causes the Lambda function in this project to execute?

options.A: An HTTP request to API Gateway
options.C: An object uploaded to an S3 bucket
options.D: A message sent to an SQS queue

questions.question: What does AWS Transcribe produce as output?

options.B: A JSON file containing the text transcript
options.C: An MP3 compressed version of the audio
options.D: A summary of the audio content

questions.question: Which AWS Bedrock model is used to generate quiz questions in this project?

options.A: Writing application code that runs on physical servers
options.B: Managing and provisioning infrastructure through machine-readable configuration files
options.C: A programming language for cloud services
options.D: A method to encrypt cloud resources

questions.question: What does the AWS CDK (Cloud Development Kit) allow developers to do?

options.A: Write infrastructure using familiar programming languages like Java
options.B: Deploy applications directly to physical data centers
options.D: Configure IAM users via the CLI only

questions.question: What is the purpose of an IAM role in AWS Lambda?

options.A: To specify which AWS region the function runs in
options.B: To define the memory and timeout limits for the function
options.C: To grant the function permission to access other AWS services
options.D: To encrypt the Lambda deployment package

questions.question: What format does AWS Bedrock use when you call the Anthropic Claude models via InvokeModel?

options.D: Plain text in the request body

questions.question: What is a key advantage of using Amazon S3 for storing both input videos and output quiz files?

options.A: S3 can execute code directly on stored files
options.B: S3 provides virtually unlimited scalable storage with high durability
options.D: S3 buckets are always private and cannot be shared
